name: Daily Standup Workflow (with Blockers as Stories)

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, status, trello_board_id, us_pending, us_done FROM project WHERE name ILIKE '{{ $node["ParseLLM"].json.project_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1;

parameters.subject: ={{ '[' + ($json.priority || 'Medium') + '] Standup follow-up: ' + $json.story_title }}

parameters.query: UPDATE project SET us_pending = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.us_pending) }}'::jsonb, us_done = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.us_done) }}'::jsonb WHERE id = {{ $json.project_id }};
SELECT email FROM profile WHERE name ILIKE '{{ $json.fullName }}' LIMIT 1;

json.meeting_minutes:
**Team updates:**
- Alex: Completed US-001 (User signup/login) and US-002 (Create task). Started US-003 (Dashboard listing). No blockers.
- Jamie: Worked on US-004 (Deadline field) but waiting for design approval. US-005 (Edit task) is 50% done.
- Taylor: Finished US-006 (Mark complete) and US-007 (Delete task). US-008 (Pending/Completed sections) is behind schedule because of API changes.

**Blockers:**
- US-004 blocked by design review
- US-008 delayed by backend API refactor
blockers: Design review pending for date picker (US-004)
Backend API refactor affecting task status grouping (US-008)
